name: Silver Miami Curb Flat Chain
details:
Here’s a complete Shopify-ready product listing for Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Chain 3MM, written in the same premium, conversion-focused style as your Silver Rice Chain page.

### Product Title

Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Chain 3MM

### Short Description (Above Add to Cart)

Minimal, classy, and made to stand out. The Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Chain 3MM is crafted from premium stainless steel with a polished silver finish that gives a clean everyday look without the worry of tarnishing.

### Main Product Description

The Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Chain 3MM is designed for those who like their style subtle yet noticeable. Featuring a sleek Miami curb pattern with a refined 3MM thickness, this chain adds the perfect touch of shine to any outfit.

Made from high-quality stainless steel, it is built for everyday wear and offers a comfortable, lightweight feel. Whether worn alone for a clean look or layered with other chains, the Silver Miami Curb Chain effortlessly complements both casual and formal outfits.

Its polished silver finish gives it a premium appearance while remaining low-maintenance and durable for daily use.

Premium Stainless Steel

Anti-Tarnish Finish

Sweat & Water Resistant

Everyday Wear Ready

### Why You’ll Love It

* Clean and versatile silver finish

* Sleek 3MM Miami curb design

* Comfortable for all-day wear

* Lightweight yet durable construction

* Pairs well with watches, bracelets, and layered chains

* Suitable for both men and women

### Product Specifications

| Feature         | Details                 |
| --------------- | ----------------------- |
| Material        | Premium Stainless Steel |
| Finish          | Polished Silver         |
| Chain Type      | Miami Curb              |
| Thickness       | 3MM                     |
| Skin Friendly   | Yes                     |
| Anti-Tarnish    | Yes                     |
| Water Resistant | Yes                     |
| Suitable For    | Daily Wear              |

Layered Look

Pair with other Studd Muffyn chains

### Care Instructions

* Store in a dry place after use

* Wipe gently with a soft cloth

* Avoid direct contact with harsh chemicals or perfumes

* Keep away from abrasive surfaces to maintain shine

### What’s Included?

1 × Studd Muffyn Silver Miami Curb Chain 3MM

Ready for daily wear
